settings.body: Use it on the sunbed. Use it outdoors. Use it at home or recommend it to clients. Formulated with L-Tyrosine, Hyaluronic Acid, Aloe Vera, Vitamin E and Marine Algae Extract, because great skin and a great tan should go together.

settings.heading: Works indoors. Works outdoors. Works on you. 🍒
settings.body: All year round. All skin types. Sunbed or sunshine, Tan Bomb fits your routine, whether you're tanning for yourself or recommending it in salon. A luxurious accelerator formula that supports a deeper-looking tan while keeping skin feeling hydrated, smooth and nourished.

settings.heading: Inspired by years in the tanning industry
settings.body:
We created Tan Bomb because we believed the tanning industry deserved more.

More than another bottle on the shelf, more than another accelerator, we wanted to create a product that looked exceptional, felt indulgent, and delivered the premium experience our clients expected.

As tanning business owners ourselves, we've spent years helping thousands of customers achieve their perfect tan. That experience inspired us to create a product that reflects the quality, luxury, and performance we believe every tanning accelerator should offer. So we created it!

Tan Bomb is a luxury tanning accelerator designed for those who expect more, from their skincare and from their tan. Beautifully formulated, elegantly packaged, and proudly made in the UK, it's a product we're proud to use ourselves, display in our salons, and recommend with complete confidence.
settings.pull_quote: For your skin. For your shelf.
